repo_prior_art.cite: panel_sdid_mc_id_v1 is adjacent only: SCM/ASCM/SDiD/MC span lattice, not two-surface tangent separability

published_prior_art.cite: standard finite-dimensional singular-value injectivity; AtheyBayatiDoudchenkoImbensKhosravi2021 and AgarwalDahlehShahShen2023 do not stack untreated/effect rank tangents
FariasLiPeng2021 estimates treated-entry averages in low-rank panels but does not give an iff target-nullspace separability frontier
ChoiKwonLiao2024, ChoiYuan2024, YanWainwright2024, and ZhuLiaoHansenChernozhukov2026 already cover low-rank inference or heterogeneous low-rank effects, but not this two-surface Riesz map

structure_flags.label: Introduction
structure_flags.one_line: §4 is not organized into the six required subparagraphs; it has four prose blocks/results-at-a-glance instead.

structure_flags.label: Main results
structure_flags.one_line: Each §8 result lacks the required \paragraph{Why this is new and worth studying.} block.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The handoff checklist omits ZhuLiaoHansenChernozhukov2026/ChernozhukovHansenLiaoZhu2019, a close low-rank heterogeneous-effect inference comparator that should be anchored in the §8 novelty block.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The estimator optimizes over a matrix named T while T already denotes the time dimension, and the optimizer is written as (\widehat M,\widehat\tau) although the objective variable is T.

soundness_flags.label: Sanity-check corollaries
soundness_flags.one_line: The vanishing-amplitude limit does not by itself make the separable estimator reduce to ordinary matrix completion unless uniqueness and the behavior of \rho_1 as \kappa_{curv}\to0 are specified.

soundness_flags.label: Example 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The three-cohort witness gives numbers but no displayed A_sep, null vector, determinant, or singular-value calculation showing the claimed zero crossing/nonzero target-null direction.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add the missing §8 why-new blocks with location anchors for FariasLiPeng2021, AgarwalDahlehShahShen2023, ChoiKwonLiao2024, ChoiYuan2024, YanWainwright2024, and ZhuLiaoHansenChernozhukov2026.

Rewrite the estimator definition with a distinct effect-surface variable, an explicit map from the optimizer to \widehat\theta_E, and penalty asymptotics that do not collapse in the vanishing-amplitude corner.
Compute the 3-by-4 rank-one witness explicitly: display A_sep, exhibit the null/near-null direction, and show the target average is nonzero.
Strengthen Conjecture 2 by stating precisely how \pi_sep differs from the influence functions or entrywise intervals in ChoiKwonLiao2024, YanWainwright2024, and ZhuLiaoHansenChernozhukov2026.

recommended_next_step: Revise the proposal structure and fix the estimator/sanity-witness issues before sending this flagship kernel to Stage 0.
